---
title: "Statistics with R"
description: "A series of tutorials and worked examples covering statistical concepts with R and Indian economic data."
page-label: "Learning"
page-band: true
categories: [Descriptive Stats, Distributions, Regression, Time Series, Hypothesis Testing]

page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
  id: stats-listing
  contents: statistics-with-r
  sort: "order asc"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "D MMM YYYY"
---

::: {#stats-listing}
:::
